pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Data Quality KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.434) to justify inclusion for the VP Data Engineering. Without stronger framework alignment, this task KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain task KSA be expected in real-world VP Data Engineering roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Recent job postings for VP Data Engineering roles increasingly include Data Quality competencies as organizations broaden role scope. External evidence supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Overturn: evolving market expectations for VP Data Engineering now include Data Quality competencies. Revised to include.

decision_rationale: Initially excluded but overturned through adversarial review. Data Quality task KSA is relevant to the VP Data Engineering based on external evidence and internal consistency re-evaluation.
